sql_array: CREATE TABLE certificates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, cert_name VARCHAR(255), cert_value BLOB);
INSERT INTO certificates (id, cert_name, cert_value) VALUES (1, 'CertA', 'ValidCertValue1'), (2, 'CertB', NULL);
CREATE TABLE keys (key_id INT PRIMARY KEY, key_name VARCHAR(255), key_value BLOB, key_type VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO keys (key_id, key_name, key_value, key_type) VALUES (1, 'Key1', 'KeyValue1', 'RSA'), (2, 'Key2', 'KeyValue2', NULL);
SELECT xenc_set_primary_key(key_name) FROM keys WHERE key_value IS NOT NULL OR key_type IS NULL;
SELECT cert_name, cert_value, xenc_set_primary_key(cert_name) FROM certificates WHERE id IN (SELECT key_id FROM keys WHERE key_name = 'Key1' OR key_value IS NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT cert_name, xenc_set_primary_key(cert_name) AS primary_key FROM certificates WHERE cert_value IS NOT NULL AND cert_name LIKE 'Cert%') AS valid_certs;
SELECT k.key_name FROM keys k JOIN certificates c ON (k.key_name = c.cert_name OR c.cert_value IS NULL) GROUP BY k.key_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
UPDATE keys SET key_value = xenc_set_primary_key(key_name) WHERE key_type = 'RSA' OR (key_value IS NULL AND key_name IS NOT NULL);

SELECT xenc_set_primary_key(key_name) FROM (SELECT key_name FROM keys UNION SELECT key_name FROM certificates) AS combined_keys WHERE key_name NOT IN (SELECT key_name FROM keys WHERE key_value IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_keys AS SELECT key_name, xenc_set_primary_key(key_name) FROM keys WHERE key_value IS NOT NULL OR key_type IS NULL;
